from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")

mpesc_base_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"
print("Using:", mpesc_base_path)

cases_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .load(cases_path)
)

cases_key = (
    cases_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("Case ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.trim(F.col("GUID")).alias("caseId")
    )
    .filter(
        F.col("legacyCaseId").isNotNull() &
        (F.col("legacyCaseId") != "") &
        F.col("caseId").isNotNull() &
        (F.col("caseId") != "")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyCaseId"])
)

print("cases_key rows:", cases_key.count())
display(cases_key.limit(20))

case_dates_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_Dates_95499/*.csv"

case_decision_dates = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .load(case_dates_path)
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.when(
            F.col("14").isNull() |
            (F.trim(F.col("14")) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("14"))) == "undefined"),
            F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
        ).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(F.col("14"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
        ).alias("caseDecisionDate")
    )
    .filter(F.col("legacyCaseId").isNotNull() & (F.col("legacyCaseId") != ""))
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyCaseId"])
)

print("case_decision_dates rows:", case_decision_dates.count())
display(case_decision_dates.filter(F.col("caseDecisionDate").isNotNull()).limit(20))

case_decision_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_95498/*.csv"

case_decision_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("multiLine", "false")
    .load(case_decision_path)
)

print("case_decision_raw rows:", case_decision_raw.count())
display(case_decision_raw.limit(10))

case_decision_ready = (
    case_decision_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        clean_str(F.col("1").cast("string")).alias("attr1"),
        F.to_timestamp(clean_str(F.col("46").cast("string")), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").alias("decisionIssue"),
        clean_str(F.col("52").cast("string")).alias("casePublishFlag"),
        clean_str(F.col("74").cast("string")).alias("decisionType"),
        clean_str(F.col("79").cast("string")).alias("decisionBranch")
    )
)

case_decision_ready = (
    case_decision_ready.alias("d")
    .join(case_decision_dates.alias("cd"), on="legacyCaseId", how="left")
    .select(
        F.col("legacyCaseId"),
        F.col("d.attr1").alias("attr1"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("d.decisionIssue"), F.col("cd.caseDecisionDate")).alias("decisionIssue"),
        F.col("d.casePublishFlag").alias("casePublishFlag"),
        F.col("d.decisionType").alias("decisionType"),
        F.col("d.decisionBranch").alias("decisionBranch")
    )
    .withColumn("decisionMakerType", F.lit("inspector"))
    .withColumn("dtypeId", F.lit("decision"))
    .withColumn("sourceDataset", F.lit("case"))
)

print("case_decision_ready rows:", case_decision_ready.count())
display(case_decision_ready.limit(20))

sos_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Secretary_Of_State_Decision_19674254/*.csv"

sos_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("multiLine", "false")
    .load(sos_path)
)

print("sos_raw rows:", sos_raw.count())
display(sos_raw.limit(10))

sos_ready = (
    sos_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("attr1"),
        F.to_timestamp(clean_str(F.col("13").cast("string")), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").alias("decisionIssue"),
        clean_str(F.col("15").cast("string")).alias("casePublishFlag"),
        clean_str(F.col("14").cast("string")).alias("decisionType"),
        clean_str(F.col("1").cast("string")).alias("decisionBranch")
    )
    .withColumn("decisionMakerType", F.lit("secretary-of-state"))
    .withColumn("dtypeId", F.lit("decision"))
    .withColumn("sourceDataset", F.lit("secretary-of-state"))
)

print("sos_ready rows:", sos_ready.count())
display(sos_ready.limit(20))

mod_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Modification_15809003/*.csv"

mod_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("multiLine", "false")
    .load(mod_path)
)

print("mod_raw rows:", mod_raw.count())
display(mod_raw.limit(10))

print("Modification columns:", mod_raw.columns)

display(mod_raw.limit(20))

mod_ready = (
    mod_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("attr1"),

        # CHANGE THESE COLUMN NUMBERS AFTER INSPECTION
        F.to_timestamp(clean_str(F.col("13").cast("string")), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").alias("decisionIssue"),
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("casePublishFlag"),
        clean_str(F.col("15").cast("string")).alias("decisionType"),
        clean_str(F.col("1").cast("string")).alias("decisionBranch")
    )
    .withColumn("decisionMakerType", F.lit("secretary-of-state"))
    .withColumn("dtypeId", F.lit("modification"))
    .withColumn("sourceDataset", F.lit("modification"))
)

display(mod_ready.limit(20))

decision_all = (
    case_decision_ready
        .unionByName(sos_ready, allowMissingColumns=True)
        .unionByName(mod_ready, allowMissingColumns=True)
)

print("Total decision rows:", decision_all.count())
display(decision_all.limit(50))

print("ALL decision types combined")
display(
    decision_all
    .groupBy("decisionType")
    .count()
    .orderBy(F.desc("count"))

decision_with_guid = (
    decision_all
    .join(cases_key, on="legacyCaseId", how="inner")
)

print("Decision rows with GUID:", decision_with_guid.count())
display(decision_with_guid.limit(50))

dt = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType")))

decision_mapped = (
    decision_with_guid
    .withColumn("decisionTypeNorm", dt)
    .withColumn(
        "outcomeId",
        F.when(
            F.col("decisionType").isNull() |
            (F.trim(F.col("decisionType")) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType"))) == "undefined"),
            F.lit("other")
        )

        # allow / dismiss
        .when(dt.isin("allowed", "allow"), F.lit("allow"))
        .when(dt.isin("dismissed", "dimissed", "appeal dismissed", "not allowed"), F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt.isin("allowed in part", "partially allow", "split decision"), F.lit("partially-allow"))

        # granted / refused
        .when(dt.isin("granted", "planning permission granted", "permission granted"), F.lit("granted"))
        .when(dt.isin("allowed with conditions", "allowed subject to conditions"), F.lit("granted-with-conditions"))
        .when(dt.isin("granted in part"), F.lit("partially-granted"))
        .when(dt.isin("refused", "permission refused", "application refused"), F.lit("not-granted"))

        # confirmed / mods
        .when(dt.isin("confirmed"), F.lit("confirmed"))
        .when(dt.isin("not confirmed"), F.lit("not-confirmed"))
        .when(dt.isin("confirmed with mods", "confirmed with modifications"), F.lit("confirmed-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt.isin("modified (adv)"), F.lit("modified-adv"))
        .when(dt.isin("modified (not adv)"), F.lit("modified-not-adv"))

        # directed
        .when(dt.isin("directed"), F.lit("directed"))

        # notice / quashed
        .when(dt.isin("notice upheld"), F.lit("confirmed"))
        .when(dt.isin("notice varied and upheld"), F.lit("confirmed-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt.isin("notice quashed", "quashed on legal grounds"), F.lit("not-confirmed"))

        # mixed / free text SOS outcomes
        .when(dt.rlike(r"appeal [a-z]"), F.lit("other"))
        .when(dt.rlike(r"app/"), F.lit("other"))
        .when(dt.rlike(r"//"), F.lit("other"))
        .when(dt.rlike(r";"), F.lit("other"))
        .when(dt.rlike(r"the supply and delivery"), F.lit("other"))

        .otherwise(F.lit("other"))
    )
)

print("Mapped decision rows:", decision_mapped.count())
display(decision_mapped.limit(50))

display(
    decision_mapped
    .groupBy("decisionType", "outcomeId")
    .count()
    .orderBy(F.desc("count"))

decision_final = (
    decision_mapped
    .select(
        F.col("caseId"),
        F.col("decisionIssue"),
        F.col("decisionMakerType"),
        F.col("outcomeId"),
        F.col("decisionType").alias("outcomeRaw"),
        F.col("decisionBranch"),
        F.col("casePublishFlag")
    )
)

display(decision_final.limit(50))
print("Final rows:", decision_final.count())

output_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Decision"

(
    decision_final   # use your final dataframe here
        .coalesce(1)            # single CSV file like your other transforms
        .write
        .mode("overwrite")      # switch to "append" only if intentionally adding
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")     # keep consistent with Horizon pipe format
        .csv(output_path)
)

print("Decision CSV written to:", output_path)
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

decision_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_95498/*.csv"

decision_raw = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")              # IMPORTANT: Horizon extracts are pipe-delimited
        .option("quote", "\"")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .option("multiLine", "false")    # safer unless you KNOW values span lines
        .load(decision_path)
)

print("Decision rows loaded:", decision_raw.count())
print("Decision columns:", decision_raw.columns)

display(decision_raw.limit(10))

decision_ready = (
    decision_raw
    .select(
        F.col("ID").cast("string").alias("legacyCaseId"),  # CaseNodeId
        F.col("1").alias("attr1"),
        F.col("46").alias("decisionIssue"),
        F.col("52").alias("casePublishFlag"),
        F.col("74").alias("decisionType"),
        F.col("79").alias("decisionBranch"),
    )
    # trim + nullify blanks/"undefined"
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("legacyCaseId")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.when((F.col("attr1").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("attr1")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("attr1"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("attr1"))).alias("attr1"),
        F.when((F.col("decisionIssue").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("decisionIssue")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionIssue"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("decisionIssue"))).alias("decisionIssue"),
        F.when((F.col("casePublishFlag").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("casePublishFlag")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("casePublishFlag"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("casePublishFlag"))).alias("casePublishFlag"),
        F.when((F.col("decisionType").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("decisionType")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("decisionType"))).alias("decisionType"),
        F.when((F.col("decisionBranch").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("decisionBranch")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionBranch"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("decisionBranch"))).alias("decisionBranch"),
    )
)

print("Decision rows (selected):", decision_ready.count())
display(decision_ready.limit(50))

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# -------------------------------------------------
# LOAD CASE DECISION DATE ONLY
# -------------------------------------------------

SRC_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_Dates_95499/"

case_decision_dates = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")
    .load(SRC_PATH)
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.when(
            F.col("14").isNull() |
            (F.trim(F.col("14")) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("14"))) == "undefined"),
            F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
        ).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(F.col("14"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
        ).alias("caseDecisionDate")
    )
    .filter(
        F.col("legacyCaseId").isNotNull() &
        (F.col("legacyCaseId") != "")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyCaseId"])
)

print(
    "Case Dates rows with non-null caseDecisionDate:",
    case_decision_dates.filter(F.col("caseDecisionDate").isNotNull()).count()
)

display(case_decision_dates.filter(F.col("caseDecisionDate").isNotNull()).limit(50))


# -------------------------------------------------
# NORMALISE decision_ready JOIN KEY
# -------------------------------------------------

decision_ready = decision_ready.withColumn(
    "legacyCaseId",
    F.trim(F.col("legacyCaseId").cast("string"))
)


# -------------------------------------------------
# FILL decisionIssue FROM CASE DATES
# -------------------------------------------------

decision_ready = (
    decision_ready.alias("d")
    .join(case_decision_dates.alias("cd"), "legacyCaseId", "left")
    .select(
        "legacyCaseId",
        *[
            (
                F.coalesce(F.col("d.decisionIssue"), F.col("cd.caseDecisionDate")).alias("decisionIssue")
                if c == "decisionIssue"
                else F.col(f"d.{c}")
            )
            for c in decision_ready.columns
            if c != "legacyCaseId"
        ]
    )
)

print(
    "Rows with decisionIssue after Case Dates join:",
    decision_ready.filter(F.col("decisionIssue").isNotNull()).count()
)

display(
    decision_ready.select("legacyCaseId", "decisionIssue").limit(50)
)

print(
    "Rows where Case Dates supplied decisionIssue:",
    decision_ready.alias("d")
    .join(case_decision_dates.alias("cd"), "legacyCaseId", "left")
    .filter(F.col("cd.caseDecisionDate").isNotNull())
    .filter(F.col("d.decisionIssue").isNotNull())
    .count()

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# -------------------------------------------------
# LOAD SECRETARY OF STATE DECISIONS
# -------------------------------------------------

sos_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Secretary_Of_State_Decision_19674254/*.csv"

sos_raw = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")
        .option("quote", "\"")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .option("multiLine", "false")
        .load(sos_path)
)

def clean(c):
    return (
        F.when(
            (c.isNull()) |
            (F.trim(c) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(c)) == "undefined"),
            None
        ).otherwise(F.trim(c))
    )

# -------------------------------------------------
# SELECT + BASIC CLEAN
# -------------------------------------------------

sos_ready = (
    sos_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("attr1"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("13")).alias("decisionIssue"),
        clean(F.col("15").cast("string")).alias("casePublishFlag"),
        clean(F.col("14").cast("string")).alias("decisionType"),
        clean(F.col("1").cast("string")).alias("decisionBranch"),
        F.lit("secretary-of-state").cast("string").alias("decisionMakerType")
    )
)

# -------------------------------------------------
# NORMALISE decisionType SAFELY
# - fix typos
# - ignore long narrative text
# - output consistent display strings for mapping
# -------------------------------------------------

dt_raw = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType")))

# Fix common typos / variants early
dt_fix = (
    F.when(dt_raw.isNull(), None)
     .when(dt_raw.isin("dimissed", "dismiss"), F.lit("dismissed"))
     .otherwise(dt_raw)
)

# Guardrail: keep only values that look like a short outcome line.
# If it's a huge paragraph / long narrative, null it out so it doesn't false-match.
looks_like_outcome = (
    (F.length(dt_fix) <= 60) |
    dt_fix.rlike(r"^(allowed|dismissed|refused|confirmed|granted|order\s+made|order\s+not\s+made|not\s+made|appeal\s+allowed)\b")
)

dt_safe = F.when(looks_like_outcome, dt_fix).otherwise(F.lit(None))

sos_ready = (
    sos_ready
    .withColumn("decisionType_norm", dt_safe)

    # Normalise to your controlled display strings
    .withColumn(
        "decisionType",
        F.when(F.col("decisionType_norm").isNull(), F.lit(None))

         # allowed / dismissed / refused
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").rlike(r"^allow\b|^allowed\b"), F.lit("Allowed"))
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").rlike(r"^dismiss\b|^dismissed\b"), F.lit("Dismissed"))
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").rlike(r"^refus"), F.lit("Refused"))

         # confirmed (+ modifications)
         .when(
             F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("confirm") & F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("modification"),
             F.lit("Confirmed with modifications")
         )
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("confirm"), F.lit("Confirmed"))

         # granted (+ conditions / without conditions)
         .when(
             (F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("grant") | F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("permission granted") | F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("planning permission granted") | F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("approval granted"))
             & F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("condition"),
             F.lit("Granted with conditions")
         )
         .when(
             (F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("grant") | F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("permission granted") | F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("planning permission granted") | F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("approval granted")),
             F.lit("Granted without conditions")
         )

         # orders
         .when(
             (F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("made") & F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("modification")),
             F.lit("Order made with modifications")
         )
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("order not made"), F.lit("Order not made"))
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").rlike(r"\bnot made\b"), F.lit("Order not made"))
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("order made"), F.lit("Order made"))
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").rlike(r"\bmade\b"), F.lit("Order made"))

         # anything else short but not recognised -> NULL (let mapper decide other/null)
         .otherwise(F.lit(None))
    )
    .drop("decisionType_norm")
)

# Optional: quick validation (SOS only)
display(
    sos_ready.groupBy("decisionType")
        .count()
        .orderBy(F.desc("count"))
)

# -------------------------------------------------
# UNION INTO EXISTING DECISIONS
# -------------------------------------------------

decision_ready = decision_ready.unionByName(
    sos_ready,
    allowMissingColumns=True
)

print("Secretary of State rows added:", sos_ready.count())
print("Decision rows (combined):", decision_ready.count())
display(sos_ready.limit(100))

# --------------------------------------------
# DECISION TYPE SUMMARY (SOS ONLY)
# --------------------------------------------

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

sos_summary = (
    sos_ready
        .groupBy("decisionType")
        .agg(F.count("*").alias("row_count"))
        .orderBy(F.desc("row_count"))
)

print("Distinct decision types:", sos_summary.count())
display(sos_summary)

# Null check
null_count = sos_ready.filter(F.col("decisionType").isNull()).count()
print("Null decisionType rows:", null_count)

# -------------------------------------------------
# LOAD MODIFICATIONS (Horizon LLAttr)
# -------------------------------------------------

mod_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Modification_15809003/*.csv"

mod_raw = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")
        .option("quote", "\"")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .option("multiLine", "false")
        .load(mod_path)
)

# Inspect once if unsure:
# display(mod_raw.limit(10))

# -------------------------------------------------
# SELECT REQUIRED COLUMNS
# (adjust column numbers if needed after quick inspect)
# -------------------------------------------------

mod_ready = (
    mod_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("attr1"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("13")).alias("decisionIssue"),   # change if date column differs
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("casePublishFlag"),
        F.lit("Order made with modifications").alias("decisionType"),
        F.lit("Modification").alias("decisionBranch"),
        F.lit("inspector").cast("string").alias("decisionMakerType"),
    )
)

# Quick sanity check
display(mod_ready.groupBy("decisionType").count())

# -------------------------------------------------
# UNION INTO decision_ready
# -------------------------------------------------

decision_ready = decision_ready.unionByName(
    mod_ready,
    allowMissingColumns=True
)

print("Modification rows added:", mod_ready.count())
print("Decision rows (combined):", decision_ready.count())
display(mod_ready.limit(20))

cases_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .load(cases_path)
)

print("Cases rows loaded:", cases_raw.count())
print("Cases columns:", cases_raw.columns)   # should be ['Case ID', 'GUID']
display(cases_raw.limit(20))

cases_key = (
    cases_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("Case ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.trim(F.col("GUID")).alias("caseId")   # new Case GUID
    )
    .filter(F.col("legacyCaseId").isNotNull() & F.col("caseId").isNotNull())
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyCaseId"])
)

print("cases_key rows:", cases_key.count())
display(cases_key.limit(20))

decision_with_guid = (
    decision_ready
    .join(cases_key, on="legacyCaseId", how="inner")
    .drop("legacyCaseId")   # keep only GUID for loading
)

print("Decision rows with GUID:", decision_with_guid.count())
display(decision_with_guid.limit(50))

# any decision rows that didn't match a case guid?
unmatched = decision_ready.join(cases_key, on="legacyCaseId", how="left_anti").count()
print("Unmatched decision rows (no case guid):", unmatched)

# duplicates by caseId (should usually be 1 row per case)
dupes = decision_with_guid.groupBy("caseId").count().filter(F.col("count") > 1).count()
print("Duplicate caseId rows:", dupes)

# how many actually have a decisionType?
print("Rows with decisionType:", decision_with_guid.filter(F.col("decisionType").isNotNull()).count())

decision_final = (
    decision_with_guid
    .withColumn(
        "decisionMakerType",
        F.when(
            (F.col("decisionMakerType").isNull()) |
            (F.trim(F.lower(F.col("decisionMakerType"))) == "undefined") |
            (F.trim(F.col("decisionMakerType")) == ""),
            F.lit("inspector")
        ).otherwise(F.col("decisionMakerType"))
    )
    .withColumn("dtypeId", F.lit("decision"))
)

display(decision_final.limit(50))
print("Final row count:", decision_final.count())

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# Normalise decisionType for matching
dt_norm = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType")))

decision_mapped = (
    decision_final
    .withColumn(
        "outcomeId",
        F.when(dt_norm.isNull(), F.lit(None))

        # -----------------------------
        # Rights of Way (exact names)
        # -----------------------------
        .when(dt_norm == "allow", F.lit("allow"))
        .when(dt_norm == "confirmed", F.lit("confirmed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "confirmed with modifications", F.lit("confirmed-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt_norm == "directed", F.lit("directed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not allowed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not confirmed", F.lit("not-confirmed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not directed", F.lit("not-directed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not granted", F.lit("not-granted"))
        .when(dt_norm == "partially allow", F.lit("partially-allow"))
        .when(dt_norm == "propose not to confirm", F.lit("propose-not-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt_norm == "propose to confirm", F.lit("propose-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt_norm == "modified (adv)", F.lit("modified-adv"))
        .when(dt_norm == "modified (not adv)", F.lit("modified-not-adv"))

        # -----------------------------
        # Common spelling / formatting variants
        # -----------------------------
        .when(dt_norm == "partially-allow", F.lit("partially-allow"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not-confirmed", F.lit("not-confirmed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not-allowed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not-directed", F.lit("not-directed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not-granted", F.lit("not-granted"))
        .when(dt_norm == "propose-not-to-confirm", F.lit("propose-not-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt_norm == "propose-to-confirm", F.lit("propose-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt_norm == "modified adv", F.lit("modified-adv"))
        .when(dt_norm == "modified not adv", F.lit("modified-not-adv"))
        .when(dt_norm == "confirmed-with-modifications", F.lit("confirmed-with-modifications"))

        # -----------------------------
        # SOS / planning-style decisions
        # (works best if you run the SOS normaliser earlier)
        # -----------------------------
        .when(dt_norm == "allowed", F.lit("allow"))
        .when(dt_norm.startswith("allowed"), F.lit("allow"))  # allowed with conditions / subject to conditions
        .when(dt_norm == "appeal allowed", F.lit("allow"))

        .when(dt_norm == "dismissed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("dismiss"), F.lit("not-allowed"))

        .when(dt_norm == "refused", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("refus"), F.lit("not-allowed"))

        # granted outcomes
        .when(dt_norm.contains("granted") & dt_norm.contains("condition"), F.lit("granted-with-conditions"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("granted"), F.lit("granted-without-conditions"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("permission granted"), F.lit("granted-without-conditions"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("planning permission granted"), F.lit("granted-without-conditions"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("approval granted"), F.lit("granted-without-conditions"))

        # order outcomes
        .when(dt_norm == "order made with modifications", F.lit("order-made-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("made") & dt_norm.contains("modification"), F.lit("order-made-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt_norm == "order made", F.lit("order-made"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("order made"), F.lit("order-made"))
        .when(dt_norm == "order not made", F.lit("order-not-made"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not made", F.lit("order-not-made"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("not made"), F.lit("order-not-made"))

        # -----------------------------
        # Default: if decisionType is present but unknown -> other
        # (prevents dropping rows silently)
        # -----------------------------
        .otherwise(F.when(F.col("decisionType").isNotNull(), F.lit("other")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    )
)

display(decision_mapped.select("decisionType", "outcomeId").dropDuplicates().orderBy("decisionType"))

unmapped = (
    decision_mapped
    .filter(F.col("decisionType").isNotNull() & F.col("outcomeId").isNull())
    .groupBy("decisionType")
    .count()
    .orderBy(F.desc("count"))
)

display(unmapped)
print("Unmapped distinct decisionType values:", unmapped.count())

decision_for_load = (
    decision_mapped
    .withColumn("outcomeGuid", F.expr("uuid()"))
    .select(
        "dtypeId",
        "caseId",
        "outcomeId",
        "outcomeGuid",   
        "decisionIssue",
        "casePublishFlag",
        "decisionBranch",
        "decisionType",
        "decisionMakerType"
    )
)

display(decision_for_load.limit(50))

output_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Decision"

(
    decision_for_load   # use your final dataframe here
        .coalesce(1)            # single CSV file like your other transforms
        .write
        .mode("overwrite")      # switch to "append" only if intentionally adding
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")     # keep consistent with Horizon pipe format
        .csv(output_path)
)

print("Decision CSV written to:", output_path)
